properties.name: Conrad Los Angeles
properties.description: Modern quarters with city views in a sleek hotel offering a tapas bar, a Spanish eatery & a pool.

properties.name: citizenM Los Angeles Downtown
properties.description: Hip hotel offering modern rooms, some with city views, plus a 24-hour bar/eatery, a gym & a lounge.

properties.name: The Westin Bonaventure Hotel & Suites, Los Angeles
properties.description: High-rise conference hotel with 2 restaurants & a revolving cocktail lounge, plus a rooftop pool.

properties.name: Hotel Indigo Los Angeles Downtown by IHG
properties.description: Streamlined rooms in a polished property offering a chic eatery, a lobby bar & a rooftop restaurant.

properties.name: The Hoxton, Downtown LA
properties.description: Sophisticated hotel featuring a swanky restaurant with a bar, plus a rooftop pool.

properties.name: Freehand Los Angeles
properties.description: Trendy dorms & rooms in a funky lodging with dining & breakfast, plus a rooftop pool & bar.

properties.name: E-Central Downtown Los Angeles Hotel
properties.description: Polished rooms & suites in a modern hotel offering a restaurant with outdoor seating, plus a gym.

properties.name: Moxy Downtown Los Angeles
properties.description: Sophisticated rooms in a contemporary hotel with multiple restaurants, bars & a 24-hour gym.
